name: Vigor Kobo Co., LTD.
summary: Vigor Kobo Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells Chinese cakes and pastries in Taiwan and internationally. It offers pineapple, red-in-green mini, chestnut mini, black stick mini, milk sun, cheese honey, and taro mini cakes, as well as beef jerky. The company provides its products through its stores. Vigor Kobo Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
